content: Stripe supports BRL, Pix and Boleto in Brazil. Pix Automatico (2025 Central Bank rollout) enables recurring subscription payments via Pix mandates, supported in Stripe Checkout setup/subscription modes. Boleto is one-time only, not suited for subscriptions. Standard SaaS pattern: Stripe Checkout (hosted) + Customer Portal + webhooks (checkout.session.completed, customer.subscription.updated/deleted). Cards + Pix Automatico recommended for Brazilian subscription SaaS.
